response.objective_caption: A square image dominated by smooth fields of pink and purple color. response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A square abstract photograph rendered with intentional blur, dominated by smooth fields of pink and purple color. The composition abandons representational clarity entirely, dissolving into soft, amorphous color gradients that prioritize atmospheric tone over subject matter.
